Choose which collections and fields the: Choose which collections and fields the search looks through.
Searches the text fields of every non-hi: Searches the text fields of every non-hidden collection. Nothing else to set.
Fields to match (defaults to all text fi: Fields to match (defaults to all text fields). Use ＋ to add a related field.
Drill into relations with the picker →: Drill into relations with the picker →
Saved for everyone — searching all colle: Saved for everyone — searching all collections. Reopen search (Ctrl / ⌘ + K).
Add at least one collection with fields,: Add at least one collection with fields, or switch to “All collections”.
Search scope saved for everyone. Reopen: Search scope saved for everyone. Reopen search (Ctrl / ⌘ + K) to use it.
Pick how each collection's results open. Collections you don't list use the
Paste a record's detail-view URL, e.g. /: Paste a record's detail-view URL, e.g. /admin/PAGE/view/BLOCK/filterbytk/123
Open a record's detail view, copy the br: Open a record's detail view, copy the browser URL, paste it here — the id becomes
Shows a quick preview drawer with the re: Shows a quick preview drawer with the record's fields (no navigation).
Saved for everyone. Click a search resul: Saved for everyone. Click a search result to open it this way.
Saved on this device only — server confi: Saved on this device only — server config not reachable.
Customize the search button in the heade: Customize the search button in the header.
Left & Center float over the header as a: Left & Center float over the header as an overlay — Left anchors just after the logo (best with the top menu hidden so it has room); Right (default) docks among the header actions and never overlaps.
Leave empty to show only the search icon: Leave empty to show only the search icon (a circle button).
Show the “{{shortcut}}” hint on the butt: Show the “{{shortcut}}” hint on the button.
Custom background colour; leave empty to: Custom background colour; leave empty to use the header theme default.
Colours the icon, label and shortcut — a: Colours the icon, label and shortcut — and tints the border to match.
